mnemonics: BAM is like a business DASHBOARD: Data-driven, Active, Strategic, Holistic, Business-Oriented, Operational, Real-time, Decisive
keyPoints: BAM provides real-time access to critical business performance indicators
It allows organizations to react immediately to business events as they happen
BAM integrates data from multiple sources to provide a consolidated view of operations
commonMistakes: Confusing BAM with traditional BI (real-time vs. historical analysis)
Focusing on too many metrics instead of critical KPIs only
Neglecting to define alert thresholds and response protocols in advance
